reference: Hi, I have a lump on the inside of my bottom lip. It has been there for over a month. It hasn't really grown, but I have been given ulcer cream. I have to use this cream for another week, and then I may have to see a mouth specialist. I am only twenty-one years old and do not smoke at all. The lump hasn't bled. Do I have any reason to worry? I have spoken to my cousin who is a doctor, and she says mouth cancer is very rare for a twenty-one-year-old, but I am still scared.
text: Okay, so, if you keep your heart open, if you open it down, and I want to be the most secure, I want to be at peace in my most secure, so I'm not considered a doctor. If you cannot consider me a doctor, then keep that in mind.
